title: Senior Software Engineer - Practo - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Practo - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
